title: glyceria catabrosa
intro: Glyceria catabrosa, also known as small-fruited mannagrass, is a type of aquatic grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of glyceria catabrosa include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and even help manage blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, glyceria catabrosa is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used in capsules or as a powder.
